questions.hindi: मैंने उसे यह काम करने पर मजबूर किया।
options: I am getting my house painted.
I got him to do this work.
I made him do this work.
questions.answer: I made him do this work.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैंने उसे यह काम करने पर मजबूर किया।" = "I made him do this work."

questions.sentence: I got him _____ do this work.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I got him to do this work."
Correct sentence: "I get my car repaired."

options: The boss made us work late.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह अच्छा खाना बनाती है।" = "She makes good food."
Full sentence: "I got this job."
Correct sentence: "He made me laugh."

questions.hindi: मैंने उसे मानने के लिए राज़ी किया।
options: I made him do this work.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैंने उसे मानने के लिए राज़ी किया।" = "I got him to agree."
Full sentence: "She gets her hair cut."

questions.sentence: The teacher made us stay quiet yesterday.
options: The teacher made us stay quiet yesterday.
The teacher made us stay quiet.
questions.answer: The teacher made us stay quiet.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The teacher made us stay quiet."

questions.hindi: मैं अपना homework पूरा करवाता हूँ।
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं अपना homework पूरा करवाता हूँ।" = "I get my homework done."

questions.hindi: उसने मुझे रुकने पर मजबूर किया।
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने मुझे रुकने पर मजबूर किया।" = "She made me stop."
Full sentence: "I got him to understand."

questions.answer: I am getting my house painted.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am getting my house painted."

questions.hindi: मैंने उसे मदद करने के लिए राज़ी किया।
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैंने उसे मदद करने के लिए राज़ी किया।" = "I got him to help."
